statement: A single-maintainer Markdown+git+Python project with no independent security assessment, no published threat-model review, and a not-yet-built safety roadmap (Sprints 3-6 still planned) fails ISM procurement expectations that suppliers demonstrate a sustained commitment to product security.

evidence.quote: products procured from suppliers that have demonstrated a commitment to the security of their products and services.

falsifier: Show the safety core is shipped and tested (not roadmap), CI gates green, plus governance evidence (CODEOWNERS, security policy, documented review cadence, more than one maintainer or a sponsoring team).
